SEARCH
Package net.boricj.bft.elf

Class ElfFile.Builder

java.lang.Object
net.boricj.bft.elf.ElfFile.Builder
Enclosing class:
ElfFile
public static class ElfFile.Builder extends Object
Builder for constructing ELF files programmatically.

  • Constructor Details

    • Builder

      public Builder(ElfClass class_, ElfData data, ElfOsAbi osAbi, ElfType type, ElfMachine machine)
      Creates a new ELF file builder for the specified configuration.
      Parameters:
      class_ - ELF file class (32-bit or 64-bit)
      data - data encoding (little-endian or big-endian)
      osAbi - target OS ABI
      type - ELF object file type
      machine - target machine architecture

  • Method Details

    • setVersion

      public ElfFile.Builder setVersion(ElfVersion version)
      Sets the ELF identification version.
      Parameters:
      version - ELF identification version
      Returns:
      this builder

      public ElfFile.Builder setAbiVersion(byte abiVersion)
      Sets the ELF ABI version.
      Parameters:
      abiVersion - ABI version byte
      Returns:
      this builder

    • setVersion

      public ElfFile.Builder setVersion(int e_version)
      Sets the ELF header version field.
      Parameters:
      e_version - ELF header version value
      Returns:
      this builder

    • setEntry

      public ElfFile.Builder setEntry(long e_entry)
      Sets the ELF entry point address.
      Parameters:
      e_entry - entry point address
      Returns:
      this builder

    • setFlags

      public ElfFile.Builder setFlags(int e_flags)
      Sets processor-specific ELF header flags.
      Parameters:
      e_flags - ELF flags value
      Returns:
      this builder

      this builder
